model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/favoritepage/fa:
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/favoritepage/favorite.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/favoritepage/favorite.ets
@@ -1,6 +1,150 @@
+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct FavoriteListItemComponent {
+  @State isShowHead: boolean = false
+  @State isChatbotMessage: boolean = false
+  @State senderNumber: string = ''
+  @State msgType: number = 0
+  @State msgContent: string = ''
+  @State contentType: number = 0
+  @State msgId: number = 0
+  @State isSender: number = 0
+  @State detectResContent: string = ''
+  @State isAdvancedSecurity: boolean = false
+  @State index: number = 0
+  @State item: LooseObject = {}
+  @State textDirection: string = 'ltr'
+  @State isPC: boolean = false
+  @State isPad: boolean = false
+  @State padMargin: Resource = $r('sys.float.margin_left')
+  @State screenWidth: number = 0
+  @State favoriteContentAlignRules: AlignRules = {}
+  @State mFavoriteCtrl: FavoriteController | null = null
+  @State listScroller: Scroller = new Scroller()
+  @State scrollEndIndex: number = 0
+  @State scrollStartIndex: number = 0
+  @State context: Context = getContext()
+  @State pageInfos: NavPathStack = new NavPathStack()
+  @State multiSelectFlag: Visibility = Visibility.Hidden
+  @State longPressDeleteItem: LooseObject = {}
+  @State delConversionController: CustomDialogController | null = null
+
+  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+    this.isShowHead = params.isShowHead
+    this.isChatbotMessage = params.isChatbotMessage
+    this.senderNumber = params.senderNumber
+    this.msgType = params.msgType
+    this.msgContent = params.msgContent
+    this.contentType = params.contentType
+    this.msgId = params.msgId
+    this.isSender = params.isSender
+    this.detectResContent = params.detectResContent
+    this.isAdvancedSecurity = params.isAdvancedSecurity
+    this.index = params.index
+    this.item = params.item
+    this.textDirection = params.textDirection
+    this.isPC = params.isPC
+    this.isPad = params.isPad
+    this.padMargin = params.padMargin
+    this.screenWidth = params.screenWidth
+    this.favoriteContentAlignRules = params.favoriteContentAlignRules
+    this.mFavoriteCtrl = params.mFavoriteCtrl
+    this.listScroller = params.listScroller
+    this.scrollEndIndex = params.scrollEndIndex
+    this.scrollStartIndex = params.scrollStartIndex
+    this.context = params.context
+    this.pageInfos = params.pageInfos
+    this.multiSelectFlag = params.multiSelectFlag
+    this.longPressDeleteItem = params.longPressDeleteItem
+    this.delConversionController = params.delConversionController
+  }
+
+  build() {
+    RelativeContainer() {
+      if (this.isShowHead) {
+        if (this.senderNumber) {
+          if (this.isChatbotMessage) {
+            ContactAvatar({
+              rawContactId: '',
+              contactId: '',
+              item: this.item
+            })
+              .margin(this.textDirection === 'rtl' ?
+                {
+                  top: 16,
+                  right: this.isPC ? 24 : this.isPad ? this.padMargin : $r('sys.float.margin_right')
+                } :
+                {
+                  top: 16,
+                  left: this.isPC ? 24 : this.isPad ? this.padMargin : $r('sys.float.margin_left')
+                })
+              .id('favorite_list_avatar')
+          } else {
+            ContactAvatar({
+              hasYellowPageIcon: this.mFavoriteCtrl
+                ?.nameAndPicture(this.senderNumber)?.hasYellowPageIcon,
+              yellowPageId: this.mFavoriteCtrl
+                ?.nameAndPicture(this.senderNumber)?.yellowPageId,
+              rawContactId: this.mFavoriteCtrl?.contactIdMap.get(this.senderNumber) ?? '',
+              contactId: this.mFavoriteCtrl?.contactIdMap.get(this.senderNumber) ?? '',
+              item: this.item,
+            })
+              .margin(this.textDirection === 'rtl' ?
+                {
+                  top: 16,
+                  right: this.isPC ? 24 : this.isPad ? this.padMargin : $r('sys.float.margin_right')
+                } :
+                {
+                  top: 16,
+                  left: this.isPC ? 24 : this.isPad ? this.padMargin : $r('sys.float.margin_left')
+                })
+              .id('favorite_list_avatar')
+          }
+        } else {
+          ContactAvatar({
+            rawContactId: this.mFavoriteCtrl?.nameNoPicture('')?.rawContactId,
+            contactId: this.mFavoriteCtrl?.nameNoPicture('')?.contactId,
+            item: this.item
+          })
+            .margin(this.textDirection === 'rtl' ?
+              {
+                top: 16,
+                right: this.isPC ? 24 : this.isPad ? this.padMargin : $r('sys.float.margin_right')
+              } :
+              {
+                top: 16,
+                left: this.isPC ? 24 : this.isPad ? this.padMargin : $r('sys.float.margin_left')
+              })
+            .id('favorite_list_avatar')
+        }
+      }
+      FavoriteName({
+        hasYellowPageIcon: this.mFavoriteCtrl
+          ?.nameAndPicture(this.senderNumber)?.hasYellowPageIcon,
+        item: this.item,
+        isPad: this.isPad,
+        isShowHead: this.isShowHead,
+        textDirection: this.textDirection,
+      })
+      if (this.msgType === 0 || this.msgType === 2) {
+        bubbleText({
+          conversationCtrl: this.mFavoriteCtrl,
+          content: this.msgContent,
+          item: this.item,
+          itemIndex: this.index,
+          bubbleTextBackgroundColor: this.isSender === 0
+            ? $r('app.color.brand') : $r('sys.color.ohos_id_color_card_bg'),
+          isAdvancedSecurity: this.isAdvancedSecurity,
+          isSender: this.isSender,
+          detectResContent: this.detectResContent,
+          textDirection: this.textDirection,
+          listScroller: this.listScroller,
+          scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+          scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+        }).margin({ top: 4, bottom: 8 })
+          .alignRules(this.favoriteContentAlignRules)
+          .id('favorite_list_content')
+      }
+      else if (this.msgType === 1) {
+        if (MmsUtil.isSlideType(this.contentType)) {
+          FavoriteSlideComponent({
+            itemIndex: this.index,
+            item: this.item,
+            listScroller: this.listScroller,
+            scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+            scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+          }).alignRules(this.favoriteContentAlignRules)
+            .id('favorite_list_content')
+        } else if (this.mFavoriteCtrl?.mmsScreening(this.msgId, 8)) {
+          // Note: buildMmsContentMap needs to be handled by parent, using placeholder
+          Text('MMS Content')
+            .alignRules(this.favoriteContentAlignRules)
+            .id('favorite_list_content')
+        } else if (!this.msgContent &&
+          this.mFavoriteCtrl?.mmsScreening(this.msgId, 1)) {
+          MmsContentImage({
+            imageProps: this.mFavoriteCtrl.mmsScreening(this.msgId, 1).locationPath ?? '',
+            ct: this.mFavoriteCtrl.mmsScreening(this.msgId, 1).ct ?? '',
+            screenWidth: this.screenWidth,
+            itemIndex: this.index,
+            item: this.item,
+            listScroller: this.listScroller,
+            scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+            scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+          }).alignRules(this.favoriteContentAlignRules)
+            .id('favorite_list_content')
+        }
+      }
+    }
+  }
+}
+
 @Entry

model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/managesim/Manag:
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/managesim/ManageSim.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/managesim/ManageSim.ets
@@ -131,6 +131,50 @@
   onBackPress() {
   }
 
+  @Reusable
+  @Component
+  struct SimMessageItem {
+    @State name: string = ''
+    @State content: string = ''
+    @State timeRange: string = ''
+    private index: number = 0
+    private mManageSimCtrl: ManageSimController | null = null
+
+    aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+      this.name = params.name
+      this.content = params.content
+      this.timeRange = params.timeRange
+      this.index = params.index
+      this.mManageSimCtrl = params.mManageSimCtrl
+    }
+
+    build() {
+      Column() {
+        Text(this.name)
+          .textAlign(TextAlign.Start)
+          .fontSize(10)
+          .lineHeight(13)
